summary: Comprehensive testing of Patent Journal Dashboard completed. Fixed critical frontend syntax error. Backend APIs mostly functional with 2 specific bugs identified. Frontend UI fully functional with excellent user experience.

critical_bugs.issue: KeyError: 'city' in aggregation pipeline at line 325
critical_bugs.impact: Statistics API returns HTTP 500, insights tab may not load properly
critical_bugs.error_details: by_city aggregation expects city field but some records don't have it

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Jobs fail with async/await error: 'a coroutine was expected, got <Future pending>'
flaky_endpoints.impact: Journal download and PDF processing completely broken

ui_bugs.issue: Template literal syntax error in stats API call (FIXED)

integration_issues.issue: No city markers visible on map despite patents having city data

passed_tests: Backend health check returns correct status with Selenium and PDFPlumber available
Journal list API returns 201 journals from IPO India scraping
Frontend loads and displays correctly with backend connection indicator
Journal refresh button triggers scraping and populates list successfully
Patents display with correct data (43 patents found)
Patent detail panel opens/closes with comprehensive information
Field heatmap displays 12 technology fields with proper interaction
Tab navigation between Patents and Insights works
Patents API with field filtering works
Fields API returns technology fields correctly

critical_fixes: Fix background job async/await issue in server.py - jobs are completely broken
Fix statistics API KeyError: 'city' in aggregation pipeline at line 325
medium_priority: Investigate why India map city markers are not displaying despite city data being present
Consider adding error handling for failed job scenarios in UI
action_item_for_main_agent.notes: Core functionality works well. Journal scraping, patent display, search, and filtering all work excellently. The UI is very well designed and user-friendly. Main issues are in background job processing and statistics aggregation.
